title: 30 Claude Features You Need to Know NOW (Become a PRO!)
summary: AI Master publishes a 30-tip tutorial on using Claude's advanced features including prompting techniques, projects, artifacts, connectors, agent workflows, and code generation. The video positions itself as teaching techniques to access capabilities that most users do not leverage.
